caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, a red bow tie, and a tall, grey, spiked wig sits in a room decorated with numerous framed photographs. He wears glasses and black over-ear headphones while positioned in front of a professional microphone. In the background, a shelf holds clothing and a white box. The logo "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears on the screen in two places: once on the left side and once on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated in the same position. He initially looks forward with a neutral expression, then slightly lowers his head and looks down toward the bottom left of the frame. His posture shifts slightly as he moves his arm and hand, which are partially visible in the final frames, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
